evidence_items.text: Shared epistemic and output rules for research prompts. Not yet runtime-wired. Candidate content for future composition into STEP1 and STEP3.

findings.text: Shared rules are epistemic and output rules for research prompts that are not yet runtime-wired.
These rules are candidate content for future composition into STEP1 and STEP3.

inferences: Shared rules are intended to standardize how research prompts handle evidence and output.
question: What is shared rules?

source_items.snippet: # Research Shared Rules Shared epistemic and output rules for research prompts. Not yet runtime-wired. Candidate content for future composition into STEP1 and STEP3. ## Candidate rules - Use only the provided evidence. - Do not invent facts, sources, or certainty. - All citation
source_items.title: SHARED_RULES.md

summary: Shared rules are candidate epistemic and output rules designed for research prompts, intended for future composition into STEP1 and STEP3, though they are not yet runtime-wired.
uncertainties: No explicit uncertainties identified from the provided evidence.
